permissions.description: Microphone access could enable audio surveillance
Can draw over other apps, enables clickjacking attacks
Can modify contact data, risk of data corruption or injection
Can read files from external storage including photos and documents
Device administrator privileges, can lock/wipe device
Camera access could enable unauthorized photo/video capture
App starts on device boot, persistence mechanism
Access to all contact information, privacy risk for user and contacts
Access to phone identity (IMEI, phone number)
Full screen access and input simulation, complete device control possible

vulnerabilities.title: Application Data Backup Enabled
vulnerabilities.description: The android:allowBackup flag is true, allowing users to backup application data via ADB. Sensitive data could be extracted from device backups.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Set android:allowBackup="false" or implement a custom BackupAgent that excludes sensitive data.

vulnerabilities.title: Exported Broadcast Receiver
vulnerabilities.description: Receiver "com.finance.banking.BootReceiver" is exported and can receive broadcasts from any application. Verify that this is intentional and input is properly validated.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Consider using LocalBroadcastManager for internal broadcasts or add permission protection.

vulnerabilities.title: Low Minimum SDK Version
vulnerabilities.description: The app targets SDK 21, which lacks security features like runtime permissions and network security configuration defaults.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Consider raising minSdkVersion to at least 23 (Android 6.0) for better security defaults.

vulnerabilities.title: Hardcoded API Key Detected
vulnerabilities.description: A potential API key or secret was found hardcoded in the application code. This could be extracted through reverse engineering.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Move secrets to a secure backend or use Android Keystore for sensitive credentials.

vulnerabilities.title: Cleartext HTTP Traffic Allowed
vulnerabilities.description: The application allows cleartext HTTP traffic. Network communications could be intercepted by attackers on the same network.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Use HTTPS for all network communications. Add a network security config that blocks cleartext traffic.
